case_title: NATIONAL CORPORATION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIP vs. GIBSON, ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY ON MEMO SETTING FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CORPORTION FOR HOUSING PARTNERSHIPS A DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR NOV-09-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 05 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-16-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

CAUSE CALLED FOR JURY TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/MICHAEL ROSSOFF AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIPU- LATION W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 50 OSCEOALA LANE, #2, S.F, CA. - WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 12-3-93, MIDNIGHT - ALL RENT, COSTS & ATTY. FEES WVD. - IF DEF. VACATES PL. WILL DISMISS ACTION W/PREJUDICE - SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL. - IF DEF. DOESN'T VACATE PL. BY EXPARTE APPL.MAY HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES, RENT & DAMAGES & ATTY. FEES - THERE IS A MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS BY BOTH PARTIES - ANY PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
